title: VirtualRealityCraft
description: An optimized and immersive VR Minecraft experience with multiplayer support baked in.
body: This is a modpack designed specifically for VR, though technically you can play it without it. It has many immersive mods such as ImmersiveMC and Immersive Portals, multiple worldgen mods and datapacks for a beautiful landscape, and baked in multiplayer support with things like Essential and Simple Voice Chat.
